titleStmt.title: SII 31.199: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 199. (A.R. No. B 202 of 1938.) ANIMELA, KAMALAPURAM TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab lying on the South side of the Saṅgamēśvara temple.
It is dated Śaka 1453, Khara, Vaiśākha, ba. 10, Monday, corresponding to May 15th, 1531 A.D. f.d.t. °66.

Registers the gift of toll income (magama) on several articles of merchandise passing through the trade routes such as the Gaṇḍikanuma, Chintaknuma etc., by the merchant guilds, for the maintanance of lamps and offerings to the gods Sangamēśvara and Vīrabhadra at Animela. In the euology of the guild, Jainagiri is mentioned as the resident of Bhikshāvṛitti Ayya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svastiśrī . vijayābhyudaya śāli
vāhana śakavarṣaṁbulu 1453 Agunēṭī
khara saṁvatsara vaiśākha ba 10 sō . śrīmatusvasti
śrīparvata śrīsvayaṁbhū śrīliṁga cakravarti
śrīmallikārjanadēvaradivya śrīpādapadmārā
dhu(dha)kulaina jainagiri nunna divāpṛthuvī maha
ṁtu mukhyamaina siddhabikṣāvṛtti Ayyamodalaina
svasti samasta janavinuta paṁcāśatkōṭi bhūmaṁḍa
ḍala vistīrnalabthānēkaika bhūrigaṇa guṇāla
ṁkṛtulunnu satyaĀcāracāritra nayana vīryavipula
vijñāna vīrasiṁhyāsana vīrabhuja vīraba
dharmma pratipālakulaina svasti samasta ni
janāmāṁka māḷikāpraśasti sahitulaina śrī
madgaṇauśvara gaurīśvara dēvaradivyaśrī pādapadmā
rādhakulaina Ayyā mukhyamaina cālūmūla sa
masta yāṁbaiyāru dēśāla śeṭṭi pekkaṁḍṛnnu
śrīmadanādi dēvadēvatā sāryabhauma sarvatāna
ṁda paripūrnasaptaruṣi varaduṁḍaina Animela
saṁgamēśvaradēvunikinni jaṁgulidēva viśāla bhuja
jaṁgadēvaraku yajñavināśanuṁḍaina bhadrakāḷi
manōraṁjituḍaina Animela śrīvīrabhadra dēvu
nikinni Iccina magama Iccina dharma śāsanakrama me
ṭlannanu puliviṁdalakanuma ciṁtakanuma gaṁḍikanu
ma peṁḍlimaṟini naḍicē Ādimārggāṇa naḍicē
dūdikaṁṭlaṁ mūlaperike vargānu pōkalu
miryālu nuvvalu javuḷi kajyauya mukhya
maina biyyaṁ jonnalu rāgulu modalaina
saṁgamēśvaruniki dīpārādhana nivēdyānaku
dhāravōsi Istimi yīma
ryādana tappaka naḍapa galavāraṁ Ācaṁdrārkaṁgā
sēstimi yiṁdu yavaru tappinānu vāriki paśula
Digital edition of SII 31.199 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
